# my-project Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-25

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x, Node.js 20+ for backend and frontend build/runtime + NestJS, TypeORM, React, Tailwind CSS, React Router, class-validator, Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress (or Playwright), pg, Axios/fetch API client, Twilio-compatible SMS provider, ESLint, Prettier (001-meeting-management-system)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test; npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x, Node.js 20+ for backend and frontend build/runtime: Follow standard conventions
